title: Governance Requirement
description: Schema for an individual regulatory or standards-based requirement.

requirement_id.description: Unique identifier scoped to the source standard (e.g., ISO27001-A5.1, NIST-PR.AC-01).

clause_reference.description: Official clause, annex, or article number in the source document.

title.description: Short human-readable title of the requirement.

description.description: Plain-language summary of what the requirement mandates.

control_domain.description: Governance domain this requirement belongs to (used for cross-standard mapping).

expected_evidence.description: Types of evidence that could demonstrate compliance with this requirement.
